verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Arise, my soul, arise; Shake off thy guilty fears; The bleeding sacrifice in my behalf appears: Before the throne my surety stands, Before the throne my surety stands, My name is written on His hands.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He ever lives above, For me to intercede; His all redeeming love, His precious blood, to plead: His blood atoned for all our race, His blood atoned for all our race, And sprinkles now the throne of grace.

verse.name: v3
v4
verse.lines: The Father hears Him pray, His dear anointed One; He cannot turn away, The presence of His Son; His Spirit answers to the blood, His Spirit answers to the blood, And tells me I am born of God.

verse.name: v5
